# 3.3 Change Detection

Part of [Component 3 — ingestion-common](../03-INGESTION-COMMON.md)

### New Classes

Generic change detection via `Product`. Combines fast `updateDate` pre-filter with full field-by-field diffing. Caller fetches stored entity and passes both versions in.

**Standard strategy:** All entity types (bills, members, amendments, committees) call `ChangeDetector.detect(incoming, stored, incomingUpdateDate, storedUpdateDate)`. Exception: `VoteChangeDetector` (EXISTS query for position comparison) lives in vote-ingestion pipeline.

#### `ChangeDetector` — Object

```
object ChangeDetector {
  def detect[T <: Product](
    incoming: T,
    stored: Option[T],
    incomingUpdateDate: Instant,
    storedUpdateDate: Option[Instant]
  ): ChangeReport[T]
}
```

**Detection logic:**
1. `stored = None` → `New(incoming)`
2. `incomingUpdateDate < storedUpdateDate` → `Unchanged` + warning log (data regression, do not persist)
3. `incomingUpdateDate == storedUpdateDate` → `Unchanged`
4. `incomingUpdateDate > storedUpdateDate` → full field-by-field diff → `Updated(diffs)` or `Unchanged` (if all fields identical despite date difference)

**Field-by-field diffing** uses `Product`:
- `productElementNames` provides field names; `productIterator` provides values
- Recurses into nested case classes, reports as `"sponsor.lastName"`
- List fields with `HasNaturalKey` items: matches by key, reports additions/removals/per-item diffs

#### `ChangeReport[T]` — Enum

```
enum ChangeReport[T] {
  case New(entity: T)
  case Updated(diffs: List[FieldDiff])
  case Unchanged
}
```

#### `FieldDiff`

```
case class FieldDiff(fieldName: String, oldValue: Any, newValue: Any)
```

Nested: `fieldName = "sponsor.lastName"`. Lists: `fieldName = "cosponsors[B000944].party"` (keyed by natural key), `"cosponsors[+B000944]"` (added), `"cosponsors[-B000944]"` (removed).

#### `HasNaturalKey` — Trait

```
trait HasNaturalKey {
  def naturalKey: String
}
```

DOs in list fields implement this to match items across old/new lists by key instead of position.

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| `stored = None` | → `New(incoming)` |
| `incoming > stored`, field changes | → `Updated(List(FieldDiff(...)))` |
| `incoming > stored`, no field changes | → `Unchanged` |
| `incoming == stored` | → `Unchanged` |
| `incoming < stored` | → `Unchanged` + warning log |
| Nested case class diffing | Changes report `"sponsor.lastName"` |
| List addition by natural key | → diff reports addition |
| List removal by natural key | → diff reports removal |
| List item modification | → diff reports `"cosponsors[B000944].party"` |
| List ordering irrelevant | Same items, different order → no diff |
| Placeholder vs full entity | Most-null diffed against populated → `Updated` with many diffs |
